mapper.select: select COALESCE(cs.today_income, 0.00) as todayIncome, COALESCE(cs.today_orders, 0) as todayOrders, COALESCE(cp.score, 0.00) as rating, COALESCE(cs.followers, 0) as followers, COALESCE(cs.total_orders, 0) as totalOrders, COALESCE(cs.work_days, 0) as workDays from companion_profile cp left join companion_statistics cs on cp.user_id = cs.user_id where cp.id = #{companionId}

select cp.id, cp.user_id, cp.name, cp.avatar, CASE cp.gender WHEN '男' THEN 1 WHEN '女' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END as gender, cp.age, cp.score, cp.orders, cp.comments, cp.certified, cp.qualified, cp.experience, cp.tags, cp.services, cp.intro, cp.is_online, cp.create_time, cp.update_time from companion_profile cp where cp.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update:
update companion_profile
name = #{profile.name},
avatar = #{profile.avatar},
age = #{profile.age},
experience = #{profile.experience},
intro = #{profile.intro},
update_time = now()
where id = #{profile.id}
update companion_profile set is_online = #{isOnline}, update_time = now() where id = #{companionId}
mapper.select: select o.id, o.service_name as serviceName, o.hospital, o.department, o.appointment_time as appointmentTime, o.pickup_option as pickupOption, o.amount, 0.00 as distance from orders o where o.status = 1 and o.companion_id is null order by o.create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(*) from orders where status = 1 and companion_id is null
mapper.update: update orders set companion_id = #{companionId}, update_time = now() where id = #{orderId}

update orders
status = #{status},
complete_time = now(),
complete_time = null,
update_time = now()
where id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from companion_income where user_id = #{companionId}

select o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.companion_id, cp.name as companion_name, u.phone as companion_phone, cp.avatar as companion_avatar, o.service_id, o.service_name, o.service_image, o.patient_id, p.name as patient_name, o.hospital, o.department, o.appointment_time, o.pickup_option, o.pickup_address, o.remarks, o.amount, o.actual_amount, o.pay_method, o.pay_time, o.status, o.refund_reason, o.refund_time, o.complete_time, o.create_time, o.update_time from orders o left join companion_profile cp on o.companion_id = cp.id left join sys_user u on cp.user_id = u.id left join patient p on o.patient_id = p.id where o.id = #{orderId}
